title: 2102026Wetreport2026Ll47
summary:
Main
• VLCC Rates Remain Strong, Next Leg Depends on Demand - The sharp acceleration in VLCC freight seen in late January appears to have peaked for now. Nevertheless, the Baltic Dirty Tanker Index continues to trade near multi-year highs, reflecting the strong gains accumulated over recent months (around +90% YoY as of early February). The AG VLCC market showed softer momentum into early February.
